name: cubolab-monorepo
description: Monorepo do cubolab — sandbox local de infra pra testar PaaS self-hosted contra Cloudflare + ACME reais, sem IP público nem domínio público.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cubolab/core && npm run build -w cubolab && npm run build -w @cubolab/cf-shim && npm run build -w @cubolab/testing
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
